title: Update beads CLI to latest version
description: bd doctor reports CLI 0.49.6, latest is 0.58.0. Update when convenient.

title: MLX provider phase 2: lifecycle management
description: Have Goose spawn/kill the vllm-mlx server process itself. Manage the Python venv, model selection, start on demand, shut down when Goose closes. Depends on phase 1 (goose-6z2).

title: MLX local inference provider for Goose (phase 1)
description: Add MLX as a native provider in Goose so it shows up in the provider picker and talks to a vllm-mlx server on localhost:5757. Phase 1: HTTP client only (assumes server already running). Phase 2: lifecycle management (Goose spawns/kills the MLX server).
notes: Phase 1 code complete — mlx.rs created, registered in mod.rs and init.rs. Modelled on Ollama provider. Uses OpenAI-compatible API format, targets localhost:5757. Config keys: MLX_HOST, MLX_PORT, MLX_TIMEOUT. fetch_supported_models hits v1/models (OpenAI format, not Ollama's api/tags). Stream path uses standard openai response_to_streaming_message (not ollama's XML fallback variant). Compiles clean. Blocked on fork before commit.
close_reason: MLX provider committed (feat commit 9ac5554, tooling commit 6216674). Compiles, untested — goose-7n6 covers testing.

title: Test MLX provider against real vllm-mlx server
description: Start MLX server, select MLX provider in Goose UI, verify: model list fetched, chat message streams correctly, tool calling works. This validates phase 1 before building phase 2.
close_reason: API-level tests pass: model list, streaming, tool calling all work against live vllm-mlx (Qwen 3.5 27B). Provider compiles clean. Full Goose UI integration test deferred to manual — needs user to drive the UI.

title: Fork Goose repo for custom development
description: Create a GitHub fork of block/goose, point origin at the fork, keep upstream as a remote for merging upstream changes.
close_reason: Fork created at Captain-Bacon/goose. Remotes: origin=fork, upstream=block/goose. Push verified.

title: SESSION HANDOVER: 2026-03-05
description:
First session on Goose customisation. Created MLX provider (phase 1, compiles, untested). Desktop launcher works. Beads initialised. Nothing committed — fork is the gate.

Key files touched:
- crates/goose/src/providers/mlx.rs (new)
- crates/goose/src/providers/mod.rs (added mlx module)
- crates/goose/src/providers/init.rs (registered MlxProvider)
- ~/Desktop/Start Goose Dev.command (new, launcher)
- .beads/ (new, tracking init)

Read CLAUDE.md and orientation.md for full context. Priority path: fork (goose-a8e) → commit everything → test MLX (goose-7n6).
